workflow_name: Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note
user_message: Just got this from Laura Anderson at Lucerne Publishing -- I need help figuring out deployment blockers. Need this before my 2pm call.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-15 15:12 EST
Subject: deployment blockers - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about deployment blockers. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-28 08:38 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Lucerne Publishing deployment blockers

Just checking in on the deployment blockers proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 14:18 EST
Subject: URGENT: deployment blockers Issue at Lucerne Publishing

Our team encountered some challenges with deployment blockers. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk

handoffs.condition: MSX update warranted from thread content

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Customer Inquiry Thread -> Response + Pipeline Note template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct deployment blockers decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
